briefs.angle: Is Happy Juice veilig voor de huid? Bijwerkingen onderzoeken, ingrediënten-analyse, huid reacties.
faq_targets: Veroorzaakt Happy Juice huidproblemen of puistjes?
Hoe lang tot je ziet resultaten op huid?
Is Happy Juice veilig voor gevoelige huid?
briefs.competition_analysis: Happy Juice is trending viral op social media. Weinig Hollandstalige reviews. DIetitians review available (Abby Langer, Lauren Twigge), but no local Hollandse content.
briefs.notes: Viral trending product. Hollandse content gap. Strong competitive advantage. Article #1 candidate.

briefs.angle: Hoe werken darmbacteriën? Wat is MentaBiotics? Gut-brain axis onderzoeken.
faq_targets: Wat zijn darmbacteriën en waarom zijn ze belangrijk?
Helpt MentaBiotics echt met darmgezondheid?
Hoe snel werkt MentaBiotics?
briefs.competition_analysis: General gut health trending in NL (Voedingscentrum, gezondmeer.nl, darmgezondheid.nl). But NO Amare-specific gut health content in Dutch. Major gap.
briefs.notes: Seasonal trend (spring/summer health focus). High search intent. Major Hollandse content gap. Educate about gut-brain axis + Amare MentaBiotics combo.

briefs.angle: Helpt Edge Plus met focus en concentratie? Ingrediënten breakdown, eigenaren ervaringen.
faq_targets: Hoe snel werkt Edge Plus voor focus?
Is Edge Plus beter dan koffie?
Voor wie is Edge Plus geschikt?
briefs.competition_analysis: Nootropics market trending in NL. Competitors: generic focus supplements. NO Amare Edge Plus Hollandse reviews.
briefs.notes: Good complementary article to existing edge-plus-mango review. Work-from-home + student focus = trending audience.

briefs.angle: Werkt Rootist echt voor haargroei? Ingrediënten, eigenaren testimonials, voor/nadelen.
faq_targets: Hoe lang tot je haar groeit met Rootist?
Is Rootist veilig?
Wat zijn de ingrediënten in Rootist?
briefs.competition_analysis: Hair growth supplements trending (seasonal). Some generic reviews. Minimal Amare Rootist Hollandse content.
briefs.notes: Seasonal hair care trend. Good for spring/summer audience targeting.

briefs.keyword: Amare Happy Juice versus concurrenten vergelijking
briefs.angle: Happy Juice vs andere mood/mental wellness drinks. Vergelijking, prijzen, welke is beter?
faq_targets: Wat maakt Happy Juice anders dan andere supplements?
Happy Juice vs Vitaminerie vs ander concurrenten?
Is Happy Juice het geld waard?
briefs.competition_analysis: Comparison content trending. Amare.com has comparison, but no independent Dutch review comparison.
briefs.notes: Commercial intent (ready to buy). Good affiliate revenue potential. Educate + recommend Happy Juice.

briefs.angle: Zijn Amare producten veilig? Wat zeggen voedingsdeskundigen? Betrouwbaarheid onderzoek.
faq_targets: Zijn Amare producten veilig en effectief?
Wat zeggen voedingsdeskundigen over Amare?
Waar worden Amare producten gemaakt?
briefs.competition_analysis: Trust/safety searches increasing (consumers want validation). Opportunity to position as trustworthy, independent reviewer.
briefs.notes: Build authority & trust. Address safety concerns transparently. Differentiator: independent, honest reviews vs. Amare marketing.

briefs.angle: Energy+ Mango review: smaak, effectiviteit, ingrediënten, eigenaren feedback.
faq_targets: Hoe smaakt Energy+ Mango?
Geeft Energy+ echt energie?
Hoeveel cafeïne zit in Energy+ Mango?
briefs.competition_analysis: Energy drink market large but generic. Minimal Amare Energy+ Hollandse reviews.
briefs.notes: Lower priority but good product coverage. Expand Amare product portfolio on site.

briefs.angle: MentaBiotics deeper dive: probiotica soorten, hoe werken ze, wetenschappelijk bewijs.
faq_targets: Welke probiotica zitten in MentaBiotics?
Ondersteunt MentaBiotics echt mentale gezondheid?
Hoe verschillen MentaBiotics van andere probiotica?
briefs.competition_analysis: Gut-brain axis is trendy scientific topic. Good authority-building content.
briefs.notes: Educational deep-dive article. Build site authority on gut-brain topic.

major_findings: Happy Juice is VIRAL trending — high opportunity
Gut health (darmbacteriën) trending in spring/summer Netherlands
MAJOR CONTENT GAP: No Hollandse Amare product reviews exist
Safety/trustworthiness searches increasing — position as independent reviewer
Commercial intent (comparison, vs competitors) high potential for affiliate revenue
summary.content_strategy: Cover high-priority briefs first (1-3). Build authority with safety/educational content (6-8). Seasonal timing opportunity.
summary.next_step: Generate MDX articles from top 3 briefs (Tue-Thu), validate (Thu-Fri), publish (Fri)
